sentences.arabic: تَسْعَى الْجَامِعَاتُ الْعَالَمِيَّةُ لِجَذْبِ الطُّلَّابِ الْمُتَمَيِّزِينَ مِنْ خِلَالِ تَقْدِيمِ مِنَحٍ دِرَاسِيَّةٍ شَامِلَةٍ تَدْعَمُ مَسِيرَتَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Svjetski univerziteti nastoje privući istaknute studente nudeći sveobuhvatne stipendije koje podržavaju njihov put.
sentences.translationEn: Global universities strive to attract distinguished students by offering comprehensive scholarships that support their journey.

sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ هَذِهِ الْمِنَحُ فُرْصَةً ذَهَبِيَّةً لِذَوِي الدَّخْلِ الْمَحْدُودِ لِلْحُصُولِ عَلَى تَعْلِيمٍ رَاقٍ فِي أَعْرَقِ الصُّرُوحِ الْأَكَادِيمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove stipendije predstavljaju zlatnu priliku za one sa ograničenim primanjima da steknu vrhunsko obrazovanje u najprestižnijim akademskim ustanovama.
sentences.translationEn: These scholarships represent a golden opportunity for those with limited income to obtain a high-level education in the most prestigious academic institutions.

sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ الْقَبُولُ فِي هَذِهِ الْبَرَامِجِ سِجِلًّا أَكَادِيمِيًّا حَافِلًا بِالْإِنْجَازَاتِ وَمَهَارَاتٍ قِيَادِيَّةً وَاضِحَةً.
sentences.translation: Prijem u ove programe zahtijeva akademski dosije pun postignuća i jasne liderske vještine.
sentences.translationEn: Admission to these programs requires an academic record full of achievements and clear leadership skills.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُتَقَدِّمِينَ إِتْقَانُ اللُّغَاتِ الْأَجْنَبِيَّةِ وَاجْتِيَازُ الِاخْتِبَارَاتِ الْمِعْيَارِيَّةِ بِتَفَوُّقٍ مَلْحُوظٍ.
sentences.translation: Također, kandidati moraju savladati strane jezike i položiti standardizovane testove sa primjetnim uspjehom.
sentences.translationEn: Applicants must also master foreign languages and pass standardized tests with noticeable excellence.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْحُصُولَ عَلَى مِنْحَةٍ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ دَعْمٍ مَالِيٍّ، بَلْ هُوَ اعْتِرَافٌ بِالْكَفَاءَةِ وَتَحْفِيزٌ لِلْعَطَاءِ الْمُسْتَمِرِّ.
sentences.translation: Dobijanje stipendije nije samo finansijska podrška, već i priznanje kompetencije i motivacija za kontinuirani doprinos.
sentences.translationEn: Obtaining a scholarship is not just financial support, but a recognition of competence and motivation for continuous contribution.
